CeremonyOverlay: The Quest Beast ate %1. Overdue quests have consequences. Mild ones.

KeeperPage: Every resident is a day you looked after yourself. The habits are the point; the zoo just makes it visible.

OnboardingPage: A zoo of odd little creatures, fed by the useful things you do. Two minutes to set up, then it's yours.

Farewells, the beast and birthdays play out on the zoo page. Go home to watch.
For trying things out. No judgement. Well, a little.
A soft nudge once a day. Off by default. The zoo waits for you, it never nags.

A small, strange, living zoo. Do one little thing a day, keep your habits, and grow a collection of odd creatures you actually want to visit. Offline, private, and gentle. No shame, no timers built to stress you.
ShopPage: Some objects turn up for free when you hit a milestone: your first hatch, a week of habits, that sort of thing. No need to thank us.
SpecimenPage: moved in on %1, a day you showed up
